    emulators/x49gp: Set USE_GCC=13

    The port does not build with GCC 14. Require GCC 13 so that it does not
    block GCC_DEFAULT update to GCC 14.

    PR:             281232

 1 file changed, 1 insertion(+), 1 deletion(-)
